close_reason: Completed E2E test batching - 73 → 29 devshell calls (~60% reduction)
description:
Refactor all E2E tests to minimize devshell invocations using the new helper functions.

Tests to refactor (current devshell calls -> target):
- 01-greenfield-template.sh: 6 -> 2
- 02-ci-headless.sh: 7 -> 2-3
- 03-native-tools-sync.sh: 9 -> 2-3
- 04-multi-language.sh: 21 -> 3-4
- 05-brownfield-adoption.sh: 8 -> 2-3
- 06-git-workflow.sh: 8 -> 2-3
- 07-reproducibility.sh: 6 -> 2
- 08-error-recovery.sh: 8 -> 2-3

Strategy:
1. Group operations by phase (pre-commit vs post-commit)
2. Batch all command assertions into single call
3. Batch deps generation commands where possible
4. Batch build/run commands

Depends on: run_in_devshell_script and assert_commands_in_devshell helpers

Expected total savings: ~60% reduction in test time (~15 min saved)
title: Refactor E2E tests to use batched devshell calls
